description_long: This is a modern bungalow set on a large rectangular plot with manicured lawns and a driveway leading to a covered parking area. The structure features clean, geometric lines and a flat roof, with multiple levels and terraces, including a rooftop garden. Large glass windows and sliding doors dominate the facades, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor transitions. The exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored concrete, stone, and metal accents, complemented by landscaped greenery and paved walkways. The property includes a spacious patio, outdoor seating areas, and a mix of open and semi-enclosed spaces. Trees and shrubs are strategically placed around the perimeter, enhancing privacy and aesthetic appeal.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, rooftop terraces, and landscaped grounds, featuring clean lines and a mix of concrete, stone, and metal finishes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, covered parking, and a prominent patio area with large windows and landscaping.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the rooftop terrace, extensive glass facades, and a long pathway bordered by trees.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the backyard, additional terraces, and a long row of windows with outdoor seating and greenery.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the driveway, parking area, and a row of trees along the property edge.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
